title: Build a Retrieval-Augmented Generation System from Scratch
audience: beginner to intermediate developers who understand basic Python but are new to RAG systems

chapters.title: Set Up Your RAG Development Environment
chapters.chapter_goal: Install dependencies and create a minimal working RAG pipeline with dummy data

sections.title: Install Core Dependencies and Set Up Virtual Environment
sections.goal: Prepare the Python environment with essential libraries for RAG development
key_questions: Which Python packages are required for a basic RAG system?
How do I create an isolated development environment?
What are the minimal versions needed for compatibility?

sections.title: Create Dummy Document Dataset for Testing
sections.goal: Generate synthetic documents to test the RAG pipeline
key_questions: What format should test documents follow?
How can I create reproducible sample data?
What makes a good test document for RAG systems?
sections.builds_on: Install Core Dependencies and Set Up Virtual Environment

sections.title: Design the RAG Pipeline Architecture
sections.goal: Map out the data flow and component interactions
key_questions: What are the essential components of a RAG system?
How do components connect in a basic pipeline?
What's the sequence of operations from question to answer?
sections.builds_on: Create Dummy Document Dataset for Testing

sections.title: Implement Basic Retrieval with Vector Storage
sections.goal: Store documents as vectors and enable similarity search
key_questions: How do we convert text to vectors for retrieval?
What's the simplest way to store and search vectors?
How do we measure similarity between vectors?
sections.builds_on: Design the RAG Pipeline Architecture

sections.title: Build the Question-Answering Interface
sections.goal: Combine retrieval with a basic answer generation component
key_questions: How do we chain retrieval and generation components?
What's the simplest way to format retrieved context for answers?
How can we test the complete pipeline with sample questions?
sections.builds_on: Implement Basic Retrieval with Vector Storage

chapters.project_milestone: Basic question-answering system that returns hardcoded responses

chapters.title: Ingest and Chunk Your Documents
chapters.chapter_goal: Implement document loading, text splitting, and metadata handling

sections.title: Load Documents from Different Sources
sections.goal: Implement code to read text, PDFs, and CSVs into a unified format
key_questions: How do I load different document types into memory?
What libraries are needed for PDF and CSV handling?
How to handle file paths and encoding errors?

sections.title: Split Text into Manageable Chunks
sections.goal: Implement text splitting with fixed-size windows and overlap
key_questions: How to split long documents into smaller chunks?
What chunk size and overlap values work best?
How to preserve document structure during splitting?
sections.builds_on: Load Documents from Different Sources

sections.title: Attach Metadata to Text Chunks
sections.goal: Implement metadata extraction and association with document chunks
key_questions: How to extract metadata from documents?
What metadata fields are most useful for retrieval?
How to store metadata with text chunks?
sections.builds_on: Split Text into Manageable Chunks

sections.title: Build the Ingestion Pipeline
sections.goal: Combine loading, splitting, and metadata handling into a working pipeline
key_questions: How to chain document processing steps together?
What validation should happen at each stage?
How to test the pipeline with sample documents?

chapters.project_milestone: System that converts raw documents into structured text chunks

chapters.title: Generate Embeddings and Store Vectors
chapters.chapter_goal: Create document embeddings and store them in a vector database

sections.title: Generating Document Embeddings with Transformers
sections.goal: Teach how to use pre-trained models to convert text into numerical embeddings
key_questions: How do pre-trained transformer models generate document embeddings?
What Python libraries are needed for embedding generation?
How to process text chunks into fixed-size embeddings?

sections.title: Setting Up a Vector Database with FAISS
sections.goal: Configure a vector store and add embeddings for efficient similarity search
key_questions: What are the key features of FAISS as a vector store?
How to initialize and configure a FAISS index?
What data structures are needed for embedding storage?
sections.builds_on: Generating Document Embeddings with Transformers

sections.title: Storing and Indexing Embeddings
sections.goal: Batch-process document embeddings and optimize vector store indexing
key_questions: How to batch add embeddings to the vector store?
What normalization techniques improve search accuracy?
How to verify successful embedding storage?
sections.builds_on: Setting Up a Vector Database with FAISS

sections.title: Validating Embedding Quality with Similarity Searches
sections.goal: Verify embeddings by querying the vector store and evaluating results
key_questions: How to perform similarity searches in the vector store?
What metrics indicate good embedding quality?
How to debug failed similarity queries?
sections.builds_on: Storing and Indexing Embeddings

chapters.project_milestone: Working vector store with embedded document representations

chapters.title: Implement Retrieval and Prompting
chapters.chapter_goal: Build semantic search and integrate with a language model for answers

sections.title: Set Up Vector Store for Semantic Search
sections.goal: Implement a vector database to store document embeddings for efficient retrieval
key_questions: How do vector databases enable semantic similarity search?
What are the minimal steps to initialize a vector store with our document embeddings?
How can we verify the vector store is correctly storing document chunks?

sections.title: Implement Semantic Search with Similarity Thresholds
sections.goal: Query the vector store with user questions and retrieve relevant document chunks
key_questions: How do we translate user questions into vector queries?
What similarity threshold ensures relevant context retrieval?
How can we test the retrieval accuracy with sample questions?
sections.builds_on: Set Up Vector Store for Semantic Search

sections.title: Integrate Language Model for Answer Generation
sections.goal: Combine retrieved context with a language model to generate answers
key_questions: How do we format retrieved context into effective prompts?
What are common pitfalls in prompt engineering for RAG systems?
How can we validate the language model is using retrieved context correctly?
sections.builds_on: Implement Semantic Search with Similarity Thresholds

sections.title: Build End-to-End RAG Pipeline
sections.goal: Chain retrieval and generation components into a working system
key_questions: How do we sequence retrieval and generation in a production-ready pipeline?
What error handling is needed for missing or irrelevant context?
How can we test the complete pipeline with real user questions?
sections.builds_on: Integrate Language Model for Answer Generation

sections.title: Test and Debug Common Pipeline Failures
sections.goal: Identify and fix common issues in retrieval and generation integration
key_questions: Why might retrieved context fail to produce accurate answers?
How do we debug prompt formatting issues in the RAG pipeline?
What metrics can we use to evaluate retrieval quality?
sections.builds_on: Build End-to-End RAG Pipeline

chapters.project_milestone: Functional RAG pipeline that retrieves and generates answers

chapters.title: Enhance Accuracy with Reranking and Filtering
chapters.chapter_goal: Add post-retrieval filters and relevance reranking

sections.title: Understanding Reranking and Filtering in RAG Pipelines
sections.goal: Explain how reranking and filtering improve retrieval accuracy
key_questions: What is the difference between reranking and filtering in RAG systems?
How do these techniques improve answer accuracy?
What are common metrics for measuring retrieval quality?

sections.title: Implementing a Semantic Reranker with Sentence Similarity
sections.goal: Add reranking using semantic similarity scores
key_questions: How do we calculate semantic similarity between query and documents?
What libraries can we use for reranking (e.g., sentence-transformers)?
How does reranking change the retrieval results?
sections.builds_on: Understanding Reranking and Filtering in RAG Pipelines

sections.title: Adding Metadata Filters for Contextual Relevance
sections.goal: Implement filters based on document metadata
key_questions: What metadata can help filter irrelevant documents?
How do we implement date-range or source-type filters?
What are common pitfalls in metadata filtering?
sections.builds_on: Implementing a Semantic Reranker with Sentence Similarity

sections.title: Combining Reranking and Filtering for Final Context Selection
sections.goal: Integrate both techniques into the RAG pipeline
key_questions: What order should reranking and filtering be applied?
How do we validate the combined system's effectiveness?
What tradeoffs exist between accuracy and performance?
sections.builds_on: Adding Metadata Filters for Contextual Relevance

chapters.project_milestone: Improved system with better context selection and filtering

chapters.title: Debug and Evaluate Your RAG System
chapters.chapter_goal: Implement testing strategies and common debugging techniques

sections.title: Implement Basic Evaluation Metrics
sections.goal: Add accuracy and relevance metrics to measure system performance
key_questions: How do you measure answer accuracy against ground truth?
What metrics quantify retrieval relevance?
How can you track retrieval performance over time?

sections.title: Debug Retrieval Failures
sections.goal: Identify and fix common retrieval issues like irrelevant chunks
key_questions: Why might relevant documents fail to retrieve?
How do you diagnose similarity threshold problems?
What patterns indicate poor chunking quality?
sections.builds_on: Implement Basic Evaluation Metrics

sections.title: Analyze Generation Errors
sections.goal: Detect when the model misuses retrieved context
key_questions: How do you identify hallucinations in generated answers?
What patterns show the model ignores retrieved context?
How can you trace errors back to specific pipeline stages?
sections.builds_on: Debug Retrieval Failures

sections.title: Build an Error Analysis Dashboard
sections.goal: Create visualizations to track system weaknesses
key_questions: What types of errors occur most frequently?
How can you categorize errors by pipeline stage?
What visualizations help prioritize fixes?
sections.builds_on: Analyze Generation Errors

chapters.project_milestone: Instrumented system with evaluation metrics and error analysis

chapters.title: Polish and Extend Your RAG Application
chapters.chapter_goal: Add user interface elements and plan production extensions

sections.title: Add a Command-Line Interface for User Interaction
sections.goal: Enable basic user interaction via terminal commands
key_questions: How do you create a CLI for your RAG system?
What input validation patterns should you implement?
How can you format query results for terminal display?

sections.title: Implement a Simple Web Interface with Flask
sections.goal: Create a web API for the RAG system
key_questions: How do you structure a minimal Flask application?
What endpoints are needed for query and status?
How can you test the web interface locally?
sections.builds_on: Add a Command-Line Interface for User Interaction

sections.title: Document the System and Create an Extension Roadmap
sections.goal: Write user documentation and plan future improvements
key_questions: What documentation should accompany a RAG system?
How do you structure API reference documentation?
What are common next steps for production deployment?
sections.builds_on: Implement a Simple Web Interface with Flask

sections.title: Test and Validate the Extended System
sections.goal: Ensure reliability through structured testing
key_questions: How do you write unit tests for RAG components?
What integration tests should you implement?
How can you validate retrieval accuracy?
sections.builds_on: Document the System and Create an Extension Roadmap

chapters.project_milestone: Complete working RAG system with documentation and extension roadmap

running_project: A minimal RAG system that answers questions using custom document collections
